sources.title: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna in GitHub Copilot
sources.why_selected: A practical three-tier model-routing change for Copilot coding work.
sources.usefulness: Lets Buildn match routine, difficult and cost-sensitive jobs to different capability tiers.

sources.title: GitHub Agentic Workflows public preview
sources.why_selected: Markdown-authored agent jobs now compile to Actions with explicit safety controls.
sources.usefulness: A candidate pattern for repeatable issue triage, CI diagnosis and documentation maintenance.

sources.title: Copilot CLI and SDK session credit limits
sources.why_selected: It adds a bounded-spend control to unattended coding-agent runs.
sources.usefulness: Useful as a governance requirement for scheduled or delegated work.

sources.title: Kimi K2.7 Code generally available in GitHub Copilot
sources.why_selected: The first selectable open-weight Copilot model broadens evaluation options.
sources.usefulness: Enables a controlled quality/cost comparison for coding tasks.

sources.title: Beware of Agentic Botnets: HalluSquatting
sources.why_selected: It examines attacker registration of resources likely to be hallucinated by agents.
sources.usefulness: Directly motivates allowlists and verification before agents clone or install resources.

sources.title: Google AI labelling requirements update
sources.why_selected: Google now permits AI-disclosure labels within image and video ad assets.
sources.usefulness: Provides an immediate compliance design requirement for AI-generated creative.

sources.title: Google Marketing Live 2026
sources.why_selected: It lays out Google’s AI-search advertising, advisor and measurement direction.
sources.usefulness: A practical roadmap for feed quality, campaign control and measurement work.

sources.title: Google Search I/O 2026 updates
sources.why_selected: Search agents and AI Mode change where discovery and referral traffic may originate.
sources.usefulness: Useful for monitoring brand/product discovery in conversational search.

sources.title: Figma AI SaaS Website Builder
sources.why_selected: Figma Make joins prompt-led landing-page creation with design and publishing workflows.
sources.usefulness: Rapidly produces client launch-page prototypes and experiment variants.

sources.title: GPT-5.6 now in Figma Make
sources.why_selected: A current model upgrade affects the quality and iteration speed of Figma Make builds.
sources.usefulness: Worth a small controlled trial on a landing-page brief.

sources.title: AutoMem: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill
sources.why_selected: It treats memory management as a separately optimizable agent skill.
sources.usefulness: Suggests evaluating memory schemas and policies independently from task models.

sources.title: NapMem: Active Memory Navigation
sources.why_selected: It gives agents tools to navigate a provenance-linked memory hierarchy.
sources.usefulness: A useful reference for source-backed personal and project memory.

sources.title: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
sources.why_selected: It tests selective reminders instead of constant retrieval injection.
sources.usefulness: Offers a concrete pattern for reducing long-running agent drift.

sources.title: CO-LMLM: Continuous-Query Limited Memory Language Models
sources.why_selected: It explores external, attributable factual memory with vector queries.
sources.usefulness: Useful as a systems reference for inspectable knowledge retrieval.

sources.title: TF-Engram: SSD-Backed Memory for LLMs
sources.why_selected: It proposes train-free, hierarchical external phrase memory at inference.
sources.usefulness: Useful for thinking about cost-conscious large memory stores.
